publishedAbstract: After upgrade from ODF 4.18.x up to ODF 4.19.8 the NFS Daemon Sets are deployed even when they are not configured: ~~~ # oc get storagecluster-o yaml|grep-i nfs # # oc get pod|grep nfs openshift-storage.nfs.csi.ceph.com-ctrlplugin-5f66dc4949-4bdjh 6/6 Running 0 21d openshift-storage.nfs.csi.ceph.com-ctrlplugin-5f66dc4949-n6wfb 6/6 Running 0 21d openshift-storage.nfs.csi.ceph.com-nodeplugin-9z8n2 3/3 Running 0 21d openshift-storage.nfs.csi.ceph.com-nodeplugin-wg4jk 3/3 Running 0 21d openshift-storage.nfs.csi.ceph.com-nodeplugin-xk7v8 3/3 Running 0 21d ~~~
publishedTitle: [ODF] After upgrade from ODF 4.18.x up to ODF 4.19.8 the  NFS Daemon Sets are deployed even when they are not configured
